models.description: Blue-toned male, mature and composed; fits steward, host, organizer, or gentleman roles.
Tech-oriented male, ideal for programmer, engineer, builder, or geek roles.
Protagonist-style male with high visibility; reserved for the mayor / player.
Analytical male, suits strategist, planner, or quiet thinker roles.
Action-oriented male, great for tester, explorer, or sporty roles.
Versatile male, balanced style for generic residents or casual roles.
Fresh-styled female, ideal for artist, designer, or creative roles.
Tech-savvy female, suits architect, engineer, or sharp professional roles.
Expressive female, great for writer, planner, or outgoing communicator roles.
Lively pink-toned female, perfect for creative, cute, or anime-style roles.
Elegant purple-toned female, fits animation, visual art, or graceful roles.
Warm yellow-toned female, ideal for friendly residents or sweet roles.
